overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunny urban sidewalk in Los Santos. The character passes various pedestrians, palm trees, and city buildings including an auto repair shop, before waiting at and crossing a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to concrete sound barrier wall

events.description: passes pedestrian in red cap walking in opposite direction
concrete wall ends and transitions to hedge row

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a tall concrete wall

notable_agents.action: man in red cap and gray shirt walking in opposite direction
black classic car driving along the street

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with vertical ridges partially covered in ivy
wooden utility pole with pink flyer and yellow notice attached
yellow fire hydrant on grass strip between sidewalk and road
multi-story beige apartment building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow urban sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete sound barrier wall on the left and a multi-lane street on the right. The scene is sunny with clear skies, featuring palm trees and distant apartment buildings. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic is visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban sidewalk with mixed residential buildings

events.description: navigates around group of three pedestrians standing on sidewalk
pedestrian density increases with multiple groups visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, navigating past groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing on the sidewalk
man in white shirt walking ahead in same direction

entered.detail: well-maintained green hedge replacing the concrete wall
multi-story pink stucco apartment building with balconies
single-story white house with green window shutters
red and white triangular yield sign at upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing along a tree-lined sidewalk where the concrete wall gives way to hedges. The environment opens up to reveal mixed residential buildings including a distinctive pink apartment complex. Pedestrian density increases as the camera passes groups of people conversing on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching intersection with auto repair shop

events.description: passing auto repair shop with red signage on the left side
arriving at intersection corner and waiting at crosswalk for traffic

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection, then stopping at the corner to wait for traffic

notable_agents.action: man in beige outfit standing at corner near newspaper stands
black SUV waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: single-story beige building with red painted signage reading AUTO REPAIR
three red newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk corner
tall traffic light pole with pedestrian signal and crosswalk button

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy intersection with an auto repair shop visible on the left. The sidewalk features newspaper vending machines at the corner. The camera slows and stops at the crosswalk, waiting for the traffic signal to change while observing vehicles and other pedestrians.

events.description: beginning to cross the multi-lane street at the marked crosswalk
turning slightly left while crossing to check for oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection, observing traffic in all directions

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
tall dark hotel building with multiple windows across the street
large commercial billboard visible above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Crossing the multi-lane intersection via the marked crosswalk. The wide-open intersection reveals a large hotel building across the street and various commercial billboards. Traffic including motorcycles and cars waits at the lights as the camera moves through the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunny urban sidewalk that transitions from a confined corridor into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by moving past a tall concrete sound barrier wall under clear skies, with palm trees and distant apartments lining the route. As the camera progresses, the concrete wall gives way to green hedges and the environment opens up to reveal residential buildings, including a pink apartment complex, while the number of pedestrians increases. The scene then shifts toward a busy corner featuring an auto repair shop and newspaper vending machines, where the camera slows to a halt at the crosswalk. Finally, the view expands across the multi-lane intersection as the camera crosses toward a large hotel and commercial billboards amidst waiting cars and motorcycles.
